subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the martyrs
subcodes.first_line: The glory from God, no other God is there but He, rest upon thy heart and the heart of whomsoever is in thy heart, and upon thy spirit and the spirit of whomsoever is in thy spirit
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. انما البهاء من الله الذی لا اله الا هو علی فوادک و فواد من فی فوادک و علی روحک و من فی روحک... قدوس قدوس قدوس انما البهاء من الله
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power of prayer
